decision_legend.PORT_AS_IS: 纯函数或无副作用形状可直接复用
decision_legend.ADAPT: 保留语义，在 Echo port/contract 边界重建
decision_legend.REWRITE: 必须改写实现或依赖注入，禁止原模块直接进入 kernel
decision_legend.EXCLUDE: 明确不进入 source closure；不为生产路径提供兼容承诺

decisions.subject: three entrypoints
decisions.evidence: F01 entrypoint hashes; F04 bounded adapted loop contract
decisions.reason: 只提取 loop/message/tool/event/cancel 语义，不 direct-vendor full query closure。

decisions.subject: Bun feature macros
decisions.reason: 使用 Echo-owned constants and fixed feature branches；禁止运行 Bun macro。
decisions.blocker: macro producer/value 未绑定，full release 仍 blocked

decisions.subject: internal src aliases
decisions.reason: 必须改为确定性相对路径或显式 adapter alias；本产物不宣称 full alias closure 已闭合。

decisions.subject: generated and feature-gated local modules
decisions.reason: bounded one-tool loop 不依赖这些生产/生成路径；message 与 transitions 只在 ADAPT 边界重建。
decisions.blocker: full query direct import remains blocked

decisions.subject: Anthropic SDK
decisions.evidence: F01 direct external import and dependency matrix
decisions.reason: SDK types/protocol only at adapter boundary；model call 走 EchoModelPort，不能猜测 SDK version。

decisions.subject: network clients
decisions.reason: kernel 不直接 import network client；由 Echo-owned model/tool port 提供受控能力。

decisions.subject: provider and auth clients
decisions.evidence: F01 runtime dependency observations and F04 excluded_dependencies
decisions.reason: 不把 provider selection、OAuth 或 credentials 带入 embedded kernel。

decisions.subject: filesystem and persistence
decisions.reason: 结果/检查点只能通过 Echo checkpoint/event port；不直接读写文件。

decisions.subject: process and CLI side effects
decisions.reason: CLI parser、shell、spawn/exec、AgentOS/proxy daemon 不进入 kernel closure。

decisions.subject: OS and environment side effects
decisions.evidence: F01 source-gap-ledger; F04 worker no HOME/PATH evidence
decisions.reason: gate 与 source slice 不读取 HOME/PATH 或 Claude global state。

decisions.subject: Claude global auth/config/history/update/telemetry
decisions.reason: 全局认证、配置、历史、更新、analytics/telemetry 与 terminal UI 均明确排除。

decisions.subject: native and optional ABI
decisions.reason: 无 immutable ABI/package evidence，且不属于 one-tool loop。

decisions.subject: pure utility
decisions.reason: 纯计算工具，无外部 I/O、环境读取或 Claude runtime 绑定。

decisions.subject: message/tool/event/cancel semantics
decisions.reason: 只接受 taskId/requestId/toolUseId/grantRevision/schemaVersion 等冻结字段，保持 first-terminal-wins。

decisions.subject: model/config/deps/bootstrap
decisions.evidence: F01 query direct list and dependency matrix
decisions.reason: 改为 Echo authoritative model runtime snapshot、显式 ports 与 task state；不使用 productionDeps。

decisions.subject: compaction, profiler, prompt dump and feature analytics
decisions.reason: 不属于 bounded source slice，避免 telemetry、prompt persistence 和 compact side effects。

decisions.subject: runtime and contract binding
decisions.evidence: F04 frozen identity and contract versions
decisions.reason: manifest/graph/ledger 必须绑定 source snapshot、manifest root、Echo baseline、runtime fingerprint 与六类 contract version。

decisions.subject: full release provenance
decisions.reason: 不把 unknown upstream version、lock、runtime validation 冒充 SOURCE_COMPATIBLE；保留 release blocker。
